summary: Focused primarily on building a SaaS crypto trading platform with AI capabilities, while also developing custom hardware firmware for input emulation and a Windows kernel-level input driver.

items.title: SaaS crypto trading platform
items.description: Polished the web build and authentication system for the AI-driven trading platform.

items.title: Minimal input automation tool
items.description: Started a new lightweight AutoHotKey alternative with a scenario engine and interception support.

items.title: ESP32-S3 input emulation firmware
items.description: Iterated on feature-rich mouse and keyboard emulation firmware, adding new device variants and performance modes.

items.title: Windows input filter driver
items.description: Developed a KMDF input filter driver with capture, injection, and push-style event delivery.

items.title: Android text-to-speech engine
items.description: Worked on a multi-engine TTS implementation, adding new voice engines and pitch controls.

items.title: Computer vision aim assist tool
items.description: Enhanced a CV-based utility with GPU inference, new aiming modes, and overlay improvements.

items.title: SaaS crypto trading platform
items.description: Built out the core platform with a .NET rewrite, deployment pipeline, and major feature phases including billing and execution engine.

items.title: Custom e-reader firmware
items.description: Developed custom firmware for an e-ink device, adding a map application and knowledge base browser.

items.title: Proxy client with custom transport
items.description: Updated a proxy client fork with new transport support and API exposure.

items.title: Crypto price prediction research
items.description: Conducted deep research on model architectures, running hundreds of experiments on a prediction model.

items.title: On-device LLM assistant for Android
items.description: Built an LLM-powered assistant with phone-use capabilities, focusing on sub-agent delegation and model management.

items.title: E-ink note-taking launcher
items.description: Developed a minimalist Android launcher centered around note-taking for e-ink devices.

items.title: Windows Explorer file tagging utility
items.description: Polished a file and folder tagging tool for Windows Explorer, working on CI pipelines and store publishing.

items.title: Graph-powered code intelligence engine
items.description: Expanded a codebase indexing tool with LSP integration and broader language support.

items.title: Neovim development environment
items.description: Maintained a personal Neovim configuration, updating for compatibility and adding remote session support.

items.title: Computer vision for online poker
items.description: Built a CV pipeline for analyzing online poker games, achieving high accuracy in hand and card detection.

items.title: Autonomous multi-session AI coding tool
items.description: Developed an autonomous coding assistant with worktree management and git rules systems.

items.title: Telegram automation and content collection
items.description: Worked on Telegram bot tooling for trading and content aggregation.

items.title: Freqtrade monitoring and strategies
items.description: Built a mobile monitoring app and iterated on trading strategies for the Freqtrade platform.
